name: Blueprint for Veal Stew (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds veal shoulder cut into 1 inch cubes, patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2. In an oven-proof casserole, heat until very hot half of the oil. Brown the veal cubes in small batches on all sides. When one batch is done, add more oil if needed and continue browning until all the veal is done.
3. Discard the fat from the casserole and replace it with butter. Add carrots, onion, and celery. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes or until onions are translucent.
4. Add white wine and boil down for a minute to evaporate alcohol.
5. Return the veal cubes to the casserole with garlic and add just enough broth to barely cover the veal. Bring the liquid to a boil, add bouquet garni, place a buttered piece of parchment or brown paper on top of the meat, then a lid on the casserole.
6. Cook in the oven for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender.
7. Remove casserole from the oven and strain contents through a sieve into another saucepan. Discard bouquet garni. Divide solids between two batches.
8. Degrease the liquid, boil it down until reduced to 3 cups, then return half of the veal to the remaining liquid. Season with salt and pepper. Thicken if desired with beurre manie.
9. Serve with rice, polenta, or potatoes; garnish with parsley.
Yield: 8 servings
